nasb.text: But David said to Saul, “Who am I, and what is my life or my father’s family in Israel, that I should be the king’s son-in-law?”

esv.text: And David said to Saul, “Who am I, and who are my relatives, my father’s clan in Israel, that I should be son-in-law to the king?”

cnv.text: 大衛回答掃羅：“我是誰？我是甚麼身分？我父家在以色列人中算得甚麼？我怎麼作王的女婿呢？”

ccb.text: 大卫说：“我算什么？我的家族在以色列那么卑微，我怎么配做王的女婿呢？”
